description: CompositionBlack polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed collar, buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hemline, looping along the sides, ribbed hem and brand name embroidered above the left hemFittingSlimWash careMachine wash in warm waterWash only with like coloursUse mild detergentDo not bleachDry under shadeUse warm ironA perfect wear for a mildly windy day, this polo neck t-shirt stands apart from the crowd with its unique side loops, allwoing you to customise its height. Wear it high up the waist on a summery, party night, and low down when on business. Team this with slim Fit jeans and stylish sandals for that uber cool look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
